items.detected_how: pH measured using buffer systems and specified for each assay; not explicitly stated if pH meter or other method used.
items.detected_when: All components of the reaction solution were present at the time of pH measurement.
items.event_description: No event-based pH shift described; pH is set at the beginning and maintained during the assay.
items.special_treatment: All buffers for reduction assays were supplemented with CaCl2 (0.8 mmol/L). For stability studies, enzyme was sometimes lyophilized and reactivated in buffer before use. For purification, 0.2 mmol/L CaCl2 was used in all buffers during chromatography at room temperature (20–25°C).

items.detected_how: pH measured using buffer systems and specified for each assay; not explicitly stated if pH meter or other method used.
items.detected_when: All components of the reaction solution were present at the time of pH measurement.
items.event_description: No event-based pH shift described; pH is set at the beginning and maintained during the assay.
items.special_treatment: All buffers for oxidation assays were supplemented with CaCl2 (0.8 mmol/L).

items.detected_how: pH measured using buffer systems and specified for each assay; not explicitly stated if pH meter or other method used.
items.detected_when: All components of the reaction solution were present at the time of pH measurement.
items.event_description: No event-based pH shift described; pH is set at the beginning and maintained during the assay.
items.special_treatment: Kinetic measurements for oxidation were performed in TRIS–HCl buffer (50 mmol/L + CaCl2 0.8 mmol/L) at pH 9.0. For reduction, TEA–HCl buffer (50 mmol/L + CaCl2 0.8 mmol/L) at pH 7.5 was used. Substrate and cofactor concentrations varied depending on the kinetic experiment (see Table V).

items.detected_how: pH measured using buffer systems and specified for each assay; not explicitly stated if pH meter or other method used.
items.detected_when: All components of the reaction solution were present at the time of pH measurement.
items.event_description: No event-based pH shift described; pH is set at the beginning and maintained during the assay.
items.special_treatment: For stability studies, enzyme was incubated in TEA–HCl buffer (50 mmol/L + CaCl2 0.8 mmol/L) at pH 7.5 at various temperatures (0–40°C).
